Title: Verify GET /users returns 200 status code and a list of users

Test Step: Verify the response content type is application/json
Verify the response contains a list of users
Step Expected: The status code is 200, and the response contains a list of users in the json format.

Title: Verify POST /users fails with 400 when name is missing
Test Step: Prepare POST request for /users endpoint with valid email but without name

Step Expected: The status code is 400, indicating an error due to missing name.

Title: Verify POST /users fails with 400 when name is null
Test Step: Prepare POST request for /users endpoint with name as null and valid email

Step Expected: The status code is 400, indicating an error due to null name.

Title: Verify POST /users fails with 400 when email is null
Test Step: Prepare POST request for /users endpoint with valid name but email as null

Step Expected: The status code is 400, indicating an error due to null email.

Title: Verify POST /users fails with 400 when name and email fields exceed maximum allowed length
Test Step: Prepare POST request for /users endpoint with 'name' and 'email' fields exceeding maximum allowed length

Step Expected: The status code is 400, indicating an error due to exceeding maximum length for name and email.

Title: Verify POST /users fails with 400 when email format is invalid
Test Step: Prepare POST request for /users endpoint with invalid email format (e.g., 'invalid-email')

Step Expected: The status code is 400, indicating an error due to invalid email format.

Title: Verify POST /users fails with 400 when payload is empty
Test Step: Prepare POST request for /users endpoint with empty payload {}

Step Expected: The status code is 400, indicating an error due to empty payload.

Title: Verify GET /users handles an empty user list
Test Step: Ensure there are no users in the system
Verify the response content type is application/json
Verify the response contains an empty list or appropriate message
Step Expected: The status code is 200, and the response is either an empty list or a relevant message.

Title: Verify POST /users fails with 400 when name contains special characters
Test Step: Prepare POST request for /users endpoint with name containing special characters and valid email

Step Expected: The status code is 400, indicating an error due to name containing special characters.

Title: Verify POST /users fails with 413 when payload size exceeds the limit
Test Step: Prepare POST request for /users endpoint with payload size exceeding the limit

Step Expected: The status code is 413, indicating Payload Too Large.

Title: Verify GET /users supports pagination (if relevant)
Test Step: Prepare GET request for /users endpoint with pagination parameters `?page=1&limit=10`
Verify the response content type is application/json
Verify the response contains paginated list of users
Step Expected: The status code is 200, and the response contains paginated list of users.

Title: Verify GET /users returns an error for invalid query parameters
Test Step: Prepare GET request for /users endpoint with invalid query parameters

Step Expected: The status code is 400, indicating an error due to invalid query parameters.

Title: Verify POST /users handles email field with leading and trailing whitespaces
Test Step: Prepare POST request for /users endpoint with valid name and email containing leading or trailing spaces
Verify the API either trims the spaces and creates a user or rejects the request with a 400 status code
Step Expected: The API either trims the spaces and creates a user or rejects the request with a 400 status code.

Title: Verify POST /users handles unexpected capitalized key names
Test Step: Prepare POST request for /users endpoint with key names like 'Name' or 'EMAIL' instead of 'name' and 'email'
Verify the system processes input correctly or returns validation errors
Step Expected: The system either processes input correctly or responds with validation errors.
